listing_name: Apartment - 4 to 5 People - Viña del Mar Center
description:
My apartment is perfect for families or groups of 4 to 5 people. Located in the heart of the city, in a quiet and easily accessible area, it is fully equipped to make you feel at home, with a kitchen equipped for cooking, beds with sheets, and a bathroom with towels and soap, providing you with everything you need for a pleasant and comfortable stay.

The space
Departamento Amoblado 70 m² in Viña del Mar.

1. Description:
Enjoy the comfort of my 70m² furnished apartment, located on the 20th floor, which has 2 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, living room, kitchenette and a terrace with panoramic views. Also, it includes private parking in the first underground.

2. Location:
Located in the heart of Viña del Mar, the building offers easy access to the bus station, metro, shopping malls and supermarkets, giving you the convenience you need.

3. Common Spaces:
The building has a variety of common spaces designed to enhance your experience:

- Outdoor pool with slide: Separate for adults and minors (slide works only in summer season)

- Quinchos o Parrillas: Perfect for meetings and roasts.

- Pool or Billiard Rooms: Enjoy moments of entertainment.

- Film Room: Ideal for private screenings.

- Gym or Fitness: Equipped for your exercise routines.

- Jacuzzi and Sauna: Para relaxarte y revitalizarte.

4. Pago Details:

4.1. Leasing
The jacuzzi has an additional cost of 10,000 pesos for 1.5 hours of use, with a maximum capacity of 6 people. The jacuzzi rental includes free use of the sauna, located in the same facility.

4.2. Warranty
The administration of the building requests the payment of a guarantee of 20,000 pesos for the use of the Pool and Cinema Rooms, which is returned if there is no damage.

5. Services not INCLUDED
Breakfast, daily housekeeping service, towel or sheet change, and no supplies of any kind.

Live a unique experience and enjoy all the comforts of this modern and cozy apartment in Viña del Mar.

Contact us for more information and reservations.

Guest access
The building has a reception and concierge available 24 hours a day, ensuring immediate assistance at any time.

The apartment is equipped with a smart lock that opens with a numerical code, giving guests complete control over their check-in and check-out times. This feature offers flexibility and comfort, adapting to your travel needs.

In addition, all entrances to the building are designed to be accessible to people with mobility issues, ensuring an inclusive and barrier-free experience.

Other things to note
For the correct use of the apartment, we ask you to comply with the following instructions:

1.- Upon arrival, check the apartment and report any anomalies that you detect and that may affect your stay.

2.- The maximum occupancy is 4 guests and a fifth in a trundle bed, ideal for a child or teenager.

3.- Pets are allowed for an extra fee.

4. Smoking is only allowed on the balcony. Smoking is prohibited inside the unit.

5. Follow the instructions for the correct use of the countertop stove.

6.- No parties or celebrations allowed inside the apartment, for this you must use the building's common spaces, available by booking system at the building's reception.

7.- Departure from the apartment or check-out is at 11:00 AM. After this time, IN CASE OF LEAVING LATER WITHOUT A MINIMUM COORDINATION OF 24 HOURS, a fine equivalent to the value of one day will be applied, without the right to use the apartment.

Very important: respect the maximum number of people allowed in the elevators.

Safety Tips:
Use of the gas grill is prohibited by building management.

Quitasol handling: When not in use, close the quitasol. To open, turn the handle to the direction of the OPEN arrow. The quitasol on being closed is tied with a ribbon. Notice that tape is unfinished. When the quitasol is already open and firm. Install the stabilizer fire pit.

To close: They must first keep the stabilizer arm. Once saved, they can already turn the handle to the direction of the CLOSE arrow.
Video with instructions request from the host or review images that we have in the photo gallery.

Damage Liability: Misuse or damage of the quitasol or grill will be penalized and will be the responsibility of the guest.

listing_name: Modern apartment with parking in front of the Casino
description:
Experience Viña from the best spot!

Apartment with parking, fully equipped, modern and renovated, ideal for enjoying the city with family, friends, your partner, or your pet. Located in front of the Viña Casino, surrounded by bars, restaurants, stand-up comedy, nightlife, parks and just a couple of meters from the sea. Minutes from Quinta Vergara, Valparaíso, Reñaca and Concón beaches and an incredible gastronomic and cultural offer. Feel like you're in a hotel, with the comfort of your own home.

The space
Spacious, bright and designed for a high-level stay. Living room with direct view of the Casino, large and very comfortable sofa, two side tables and coffee table, plus dining table ideal for eating or working. Main Smart TV with Netflix, local signal and sound bar, high-speed Wi-Fi and air conditioning for a perfect atmosphere all year round.

Modern and highly equipped, bright and functional kitchen: large two-door refrigerator, electric countertop, extractor, microwave, kettle, toaster, pots, utensils and electric grill. Designed for cooking in total comfort.

🛏️ Master bedroom with a newly purchased premium king-size bed, hotel-quality bedding, TV with Netflix, and access to the balcony.

🛏️ Second bedroom with a trundle bed (1½ beds + 1 bed), full bedding, a desk for working remotely with an additional monitor and an ergonomic chair, and access to the balcony.

All windows have a mirror effect sheet and UV protection, allowing natural light and total privacy during the day without the need to close curtains. The entire apartment overlooks the casino and on New Year's Eve you can see the fireworks from the apartment itself.

🚿 Large bathroom with shower, washer/dryer and mirror with adjustable light.
🌿 Comfortable terrace with furniture to enjoy Viña's climate.

🔐 24/7 security, surveillance cameras at the building entrance and on every floor, concierge service, and a private entrance to the apartment, with a key for complete independence.

🚘 1 private parking space available.

Guest access
Entire apartment

Other things to note
You will be in one of the most privileged sectors of the city, in front of the Viña Casino and surrounded by entertainment, gastronomy and culture.

From the apartment you can get around on foot or in minutes: public transport 50 m away with direct connection to Valparaíso, bicycle rental a few steps away and taxis/Uber available at all times. In front of the building there is a park, children's games and restaurants open 24 hours. The area has multiple parking options, including private options at the Casino and surrounding areas. Ideal for enjoying Viña with total freedom, day and night.

description:
In front of Playa Cochoa, Reñaca. Large balcony and incredible ocean views. Four bedrooms (two en-suite), three bathrooms and double parking. Only 10 blocks from the main beach of Reñaca. The building offers outdoor pools (Dec-Mar), paddle tennis courts, gym, sauna, jacuzzi, game room and SUM with grill (some with extra cost). 24-hour security and restaurants within walking distance. After Easter, the elevators will be under maintenance; access is via Tower A, followed by 3 flights of stairs.

The space
The layout of the beds is as follows:

Two bedrooms with two queen size beds each. Placares. One with access to the oceanfront balcony. Another with a window overlooking the ocean.

A bedroom with a double bed (two mattresses together and a 1.80 m by 1.90 m king mattress cover) and an en-suite bathroom. Closets. TV in the room. Exit to the oceanfront balcony.

One bedroom with a twin bunk bed. Ensuite bathroom. Placares.

all bedrooms have closets!

Fully equipped kitchen. Four-burner stove, gas oven, extractor. Microwave oven. Toaster. Electric ovens. Refrigerator with ample freezer. Electric ceiling.

It's warm, impeccable, comfortable. Crossing the street is Cochoa beach. Great location. Unbeatable beach and Valparaiso view.

The building has a SUM with a barbecue grill (extra charge). The apartment does not have a barbecue grill.

Guest access
Swimming pools, paddle courts, pool and metegol. Quincho with churrasquera for events, laundry, cafeteria, gym, sauna, jacuzzi. ALL the amenities of the building are paid separately at the reception, minus the use of the pools, paddle court, Ping pong and metegol which are free. Paddles and balls are not included in the apartment.

IMPORTANT! After Easter, they will be repairing the elevators in our tower (TOWER B), so you can use the elevators in TOWER A, which go up to the 9th floor and are connected to TOWER B by a walkway. Then you have to climb 3 floors by stairs. In August the new elevators would be ready to use!

Other things to note
• The apartment does not have a grill. However, the building has a SUM with a grill that can be booked and rented at the concierge.

• Groups of teenagers are not allowed.

• The apartment is delivered with sheets and quilts. Towels and bath towels must be brought by guests.

• IMPORTANT: After Easter, maintenance will be carried out on the elevators in our tower (Tower B). In the meantime, you can use the elevators in Tower A, which go up to the 9th floor. listing_name: Reñaca - Jose Manuel Balmaceda 830 Street.
description:
Brisas Marinas Building, cozy apartment in a quiet neighborhood, 4th floor. floor, no elevator but gentle stairs; very close to the beach in Reñaca (6 short blocks). Space with terrace, good light and basement parking.
sheets and towels always clean as well as the apartment

The space
There is a concierge and surveillance camera.
In 5 minutes walking you reach the beach there you will find a very good gastronomic offer and all kinds of services, a shopping center. Close to Tottus 150 m and Santa Isabel in Reñaca

Guest access
The complex's pool can be used, and there is a laundry space with coin-operated washers and dryers.

Other things to note
There will always be tea or coffee available, in case you arrive very late and cannot go to the supermarket before. Some oil and sugar or sweetener to get by.
